title: Complete the Summary
instructions: Complete the summary below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage.

questions.prompt: The Chernobyl Exclusion Zone was created after the nuclear accident in ____.
The zone has become an unintended experiment in large-scale ____.
Large mammals such as wolves, foxes and ____ have become more common.
In the Red Forest, pine trees turned ____ before dying.
Tree frogs may be darker because of higher ____ levels.
Some animals show reduced reproductive success and higher ____.
